name: CTA Banner
description: Full-width gradient call-to-action banner with bold headline, supporting subtext, and a prominent action button. Conversion-focused section designed to sit near the bottom of landing pages. Features a multi-stop gradient background that spans the full viewport width.

gradient.description: Full-width section with a vibrant multi-stop gradient background (coral -> amber -> cyan -> green at 135deg). Dark text on the bright gradient. Centered layout with: bold headline (2.2rem, dark), supporting paragraph (1.1rem, dark/70%), and a dark pill button. Generous padding (100px vertical). The gradient creates a strong visual break from dark content sections above and below.

slots.headline: Bold heading with _fs[2.2rem] _fw700 _fgdark _mb3 _ls[-0.02em]. Direct, action-oriented text like 'Ready to Build Something Great?'
slots.subtext: Supporting paragraph with _fs[1.1rem] _fgdark/70 _mb8. Brief value proposition or urgency statement.
slots.cta-button: Dark pill Button: _inline-flex _items[center] _gap2 _py3 _px9 _bgdark _fgwhite _fw700 _fs[1rem] _border[none] _rounded[100px] _transition. Hover: translateY(-2px) with dark box-shadow.

dark.description: Dark background section with colored text and a colored pill button. Reversed contrast from the gradient preset. Uses the dark app background with a vibrant accent-colored headline, muted subtext, and a primary-colored pill button. Subtler visual treatment, good for sections that should feel integrated with the overall dark theme.

slots.headline: Bold heading with _fs[2.2rem] _fw700 _fgprimary _mb3 _ls[-0.02em]. Uses the brand accent color.
slots.cta-button: Primary pill Button: _rounded[100px] _bgprimary _fgwhite _fw700 _py3 _px9. Hover lifts with shadow.
